lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: The word of the LORD came to Jonah a second time. The road ahead runs toward Nineveh.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.text: You look like a man who has seen death and kept walking. Help me stand, and bring me water from the spring east of the road.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.text: The spring lies eastward in the stones. My throat cannot wait long.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.text: That water is life. The gate of Nineveh lies ahead. Speak quickly there; the city hears only what is urgent.

lines.speaker: Caravan Guard
lines.text: The road to Nineveh is open, but the city does not welcome every voice.

lines.speaker: Milestone
lines.text: Nineveh: a great city, many streets, and many sins.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text: Cool water gathers between the rocks. Jonah fills a flask.
